g.text: 岩 性 描 述
Pale yellow calcareous mudstone with ammonoids (H. parvus FAD)
Black calcareous shale with limestone interbeds
Grey sandstone interbedded with mudstone and coal seams
Black siliceous shale with phosphate nodules
Meishan Section — Permian-Triassic Boundary GSSP | 总厚 86m | 7 层 | 比例尺 1:336
